title: Jolene
album: Diamonds & Rhinestones: The Greatest Hits Collection
why_this_song: Jolene by Dolly Parton (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 31 times; first heard in: "Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'm begging of you, please, don't take my man"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Please don't take him just because you can
You could have your choice of men
But I could never love again

excerpts.text: And I cannot compete with you, Jolene
Please don't take him just because you can

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Dolly Parton one question about "Jolene", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Dolly Parton sobre "Jolene", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Jolene" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Jolene" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Jolene" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Jolene" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
